# SongGeneration Source Snapshot

This directory is based on `tencent-ailab/SongGeneration` commit `b1b03ec`.

It keeps the upstream source code, small sample files, and local Apple
MPS-compatible decoder bridge changes. Large checkpoint and runtime assets are
not tracked here:

- `runtime/`
- `ckpt`
- `third_party`
- `songgeneration_v2_*`

Download those assets separately when running the official PyTorch decoder.
